/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-variable -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/clickbench.dir/clickbench.cpp.o -o clickbench  ../src/queries_executor/libexecutor.a ../src/engine/libengine.a ../src/CsvMfReader/libreader.a ../src/CsvMfWriter/libwriter.a
